entries.name: Ethos Forge — project state snapshot (2026-04-28)
entries.description: Handoff snapshot pos prompt #1 + doc-sweep. 4 commits locais, 17 workspaces validados. Decisoes travadas: Forge=kit (apps de produto em templates/starter/apps), 15 packages (7 infra + 8 plugaveis), generators em tools/, Modelo B CRUD, multi-tenant via AsyncLocalStorage, argon2id+JWT cookie httpOnly. Proximo passo: prompt #2 (tooling: ESLint+Prettier+Husky+commitlint+CI). Spec completa em .claude/commands/notes.md.
